spine.zh: 一个随每节课长大的迷你 agent。
spine.en: A tiny agent that grows each lesson.

thesis.zh: 所有 agent 都是同一个循环，逐个机制叠上去。
thesis.en: Every agent is the same loop, with one mechanism stacked on at a time.

audience.zh: 想从代码里真正看懂 agent 骨架的开发者。
audience.en: Developers who want to really understand an agent skeleton from code.

whyThisOrder.zh: 先让循环跑起来，再解释谁在驱动它、谁在约束它。
whyThisOrder.en: First make the loop run, then explain what drives it and what constrains it.

archDiagram.diagram:
flowchart TD
  index["index.ts CLI"] --> loop["loop.ts 循环"]
  prompt["prompt.ts 系统提示词"] --> loop
  loop --> model["model.ts 调模型"]
  loop --> tools["tools.ts 读写工具"]

summary.zh: 赋予 agent 生命的循环与提示词。
summary.en: The loop and the prompt that give the agent life.

role.zh: 先搭出最小可运行骨架，再引入行为约束。
role.en: First build the minimal runnable skeleton, then add behavioral constraints.

transitionIn.zh: 从仓库整体视图收缩到最小 agent 主循环。
transitionIn.en: Narrow from the full repo view down to the minimal agent main loop.

transitionOut.zh: 当循环能跑后，自然会追问它为什么会这样行动。
transitionOut.en: Once the loop runs, the next natural question is why it behaves this way.

theProblem.zh: 模型只会输出文本，不会自己执行、看不到结果就停了。
theProblem.en: The model only emits text; it won't run anything or react to results.

objective.zh: 理解模型与工具之间的循环。
objective.en: Understand the loop between model and tools.

whyNow.zh: 一切后续能力都挂在这个循环上。
whyNow.en: Every later capability hangs off this loop.

missingBefore.zh: 还没有一个能持续读结果再决策的执行骨架。
missingBefore.en: We still lacked an execution skeleton that can keep reading results and deciding again.

nextPressure.zh: 循环跑起来后，你会立刻追问：谁在第一轮前规定它该怎么做？
nextPressure.en: Once the loop runs, you immediately ask: what decides how it should behave before turn one?

theProblem.zh: 同一个模型，换句话开场表现就不同。
theProblem.en: Same model, different opening — different behavior.

objective.zh: 看清系统提示词如何设定行为。
objective.en: See how the system prompt sets behavior.

whyNow.zh: 循环已经能跑了，接下来要解释行为为什么稳定。
whyNow.en: Now that the loop runs, we need to explain why its behavior stays stable.

missingBefore.zh: 前一节只有执行骨架，还没有行为约束来源。
missingBefore.en: The previous lesson gave us only an execution skeleton, not the source of behavioral constraints.

nextPressure.zh: 规则写死后，又会暴露提示词如何组织、拼接与演化的问题。
nextPressure.en: Once the rules are fixed, the next pressure is how prompts are organized, composed, and evolved.

theProblem.zh: 模型只会输出文本，不会自己执行、看不到结果就停了。
theProblem.en: The model only emits text; it won't run anything or react to results.

objective.zh: 理解模型与工具之间的循环。
objective.en: Understand the loop between model and tools.

whyNow.zh: 一切后续能力都挂在这个循环上。
whyNow.en: Every later capability hangs off this loop.

missingBefore.zh: 还没有一个能持续读结果再决策的执行骨架。
missingBefore.en: We still lacked an execution skeleton that can keep reading results and deciding again.

nextPressure.zh: 循环跑起来后，你会立刻追问：谁在第一轮前规定它该怎么做？
nextPressure.en: Once the loop runs, you immediately ask: what decides how it should behave before turn one?

theProblem.zh: 同一个模型，换句话开场表现就不同。
theProblem.en: Same model, different opening — different behavior.

objective.zh: 看清系统提示词如何设定行为。
objective.en: See how the system prompt sets behavior.

whyNow.zh: 循环已经能跑了，接下来要解释行为为什么稳定。
whyNow.en: Now that the loop runs, we need to explain why its behavior stays stable.

missingBefore.zh: 前一节只有执行骨架，还没有行为约束来源。
missingBefore.en: The previous lesson gave us only an execution skeleton, not the source of behavioral constraints.

nextPressure.zh: 规则写死后，又会暴露提示词如何组织、拼接与演化的问题。
nextPressure.en: Once the rules are fixed, the next pressure is how prompts are organized, composed, and evolved.

principle.zh: 循环让模型从「说」变成「做」。
principle.en: The loop turns the model from talking into doing.

teachingScope.zh: 只讲最小 agent 循环，不展开并行调度、长上下文压缩与恢复策略。
teachingScope.en: Focus only on the minimal agent loop; do not expand into parallel scheduling, long-context compaction, or recovery strategy.

problem.zh: 大模型只会输出文本。你想让它读写文件，它却停在这——差距就在「循环」。
problem.en: An LLM only emits text. You want it to read/write files, but it stops there — the gap is the loop.

solution.zh: 一个 while(true)：模型调工具就继续，不调就停。
solution.en: A while(true): keep going while the model calls tools, stop when it doesn't.

diagram.diagram:
flowchart LR
  user["用户消息"] --> model["调用模型"]
  model --> check{"有 tool_use?"}
  check -->|"有"| exec["执行工具"] --> model
  check -->|"无"| done["返回结果"]

desc.zh: 把用户问题作为第一条消息，连同工具定义发给模型。
desc.en: Send the user's question plus tool definitions to the model.

desc.zh: 没有 tool_use 就返回，否则把模型回答追加进消息。
desc.en: Return if there's no tool_use; otherwise append the model's reply.

desc.zh: 真实仓库里循环在 loop.ts 的 loop() 中，还多了工具结果回传与错误处理。
desc.en: In the real repo the loop lives in loop.ts's loop(), with tool-result feedback and error handling added.

code.snippet:
while (true) {
  const response = await callModel({ systemPrompt, messages });

deepDive.zh:
## 为什么是循环
模型只会输出文本；没有循环，它只能「说」不能「做」。把模型调用放进 while，让它读到工具结果后继续决策，才把"对话"变成"执行"。

## 取舍
- 用"是否还有 tool_use"判断停止，而不是让模型显式说"我做完了"——更稳，不依赖措辞。
- 教学版一次只跑一个工具、不做并行，换来代码清晰。

## 边界与坑
模型可能反复调用同一个工具陷入死循环——真实实现会加步数上限或重复检测。
deepDive.en:
## Why a loop
An LLM only emits text; without a loop it can only "talk", not "act". Wrapping the model call in a while loop — so it reads tool results and keeps deciding — is what turns a conversation into execution.

## Trade-offs
- Stop on "no more tool_use" rather than asking the model to say "I'm done" — sturdier, not wording-dependent.
- The teaching version runs one tool at a time, no parallelism, trading throughput for clarity.

## Edges & gotchas
The model can loop forever calling the same tool — the real implementation adds a step cap or repeat detection.

deepSource.zh:
真实仓库的循环在 `src/loop.ts` 的 `loop()` 里，骨架与教学版一致，但外面包了不少工程细节。

| 维度 | 教学版 | 真实实现 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 工具结果 | 直接拼进 messages | 以 `role:"tool"` 回传，按 id 关联 |
| 出错 | 不处理 | 重试 + 降级 |
| 上下文超长 | 不处理 | compaction 压缩 |
| 停止条件 | 无 tool_use 即停 | 再叠加步数上限/中断信号 |

这些都挂在循环外围、主体不变——所以教学版省掉它们不影响你理解"循环"本身。
deepSource.en:
The real loop lives in `loop()` in `src/loop.ts` — same skeleton as the teaching version, but wrapped in engineering detail.

| Aspect | Teaching | Real |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Tool result | spliced into messages | sent back as `role:"tool"`, keyed by id |
| Errors | ignored | retry + fallback |
| Long context | ignored | compaction |
| Stop | no tool_use | plus step cap / interrupt signal |

All of it hangs around the loop — the body is unchanged, so dropping it in the teaching version doesn't hurt your understanding of "the loop".

simplified.zh: 直接把 reply 留在本地变量里
simplified.en: keep reply in a local variable

real.zh: 显式回填 tool role 与 call id
real.en: explicitly feed back tool role and call id

whySimplified.en: focus on the main control flow first

real.zh: 还叠加步数上限与中断处理
real.en: also add a step cap and interrupt handling

whySimplified.en: teach the core stop condition first

real.zh: 有重试、降级与异常包装
real.en: includes retry, fallback, and exception wrapping

whySimplified.zh: 先别让工程噪音盖过主机制
whySimplified.en: avoid letting engineering noise bury the core mechanism

commands.zh: 让模型列出当前目录的 Python 文件
commands.en: Ask the model to list Python files in the current directory

observe.zh: 什么时候循环继续，什么时候直接结束
observe.en: When the loop continues versus ends immediately

whatsNext.zh: 当循环能持续运行后，下一个问题就是：到底是什么规则在第一轮之前就把模型行为定住了？这正是系统提示词要回答的。
whatsNext.en: Once the loop can keep running, the next question is: what locks the model's behavior in before turn one? That's exactly what the system prompt answers.

whyUsed.zh: 补充 agent 循环设计背景

principle.zh: 提示词是 agent 的宪法。
principle.en: The prompt is the agent's constitution.

teachingScope.zh: 只讲 system prompt 如何约束行为，不展开 prompt 模板系统与权限策略生成器。
teachingScope.en: Focus only on how the system prompt constrains behavior, not on template systems or permission-policy generators.

problem.zh: 同一个模型，表现不同——系统提示词在第一轮之前就定下基调。
problem.en: Same model, different behavior — the system prompt sets the tone before turn one.

solution.zh: 把行为规则写成常量，注入 system 字段。
solution.en: Encode the behavioral rules as a constant, injected into the system field.

caption.en: The system prompt sets the tone

diagram.diagram:
flowchart TD
  sys["系统提示词"] --> behavior["模型行为基调"]
  user["用户消息"] --> behavior

desc.zh: 规则写成常量，循环里把它作为 systemPrompt 传给模型。
desc.en: Rules as a constant, passed into the loop as systemPrompt.

code.snippet: const systemPrompt = "You are nano-agent. Use tools to read and write files.";

desc.zh: 真实仓库把系统提示词单独放在 prompt.ts，便于迭代与拼接。
desc.en: The real repo keeps the system prompt in its own prompt.ts for easy iteration and composition.

deepDive.zh:
## 为什么放在 system
system 字段在第一轮之前就定下基调，权重高于普通用户消息。把行为规则放这里，比每轮重复叮嘱更省 token、更稳定。

## 取舍
- 写成常量 vs 模板拼接：常量简单、可读；真实项目常按工具集/权限动态拼接。
- 关键规则放开头和结尾——模型对首尾更敏感。

## 边界与坑
改一句话就可能显著改变行为，却几乎不增加代码——杠杆极高，也意味着容易踩坑，需要回归测试。
deepDive.en:
## Why put it in system
The system field sets the tone before turn one and outweighs ordinary user messages. Putting behavioral rules here is cheaper (tokens) and steadier than re-stating them every turn.

## Trade-offs
- Constant vs templated: a constant is simple and readable; real projects assemble it dynamically by toolset/permissions.
- Put key rules at the start AND end — models weight the edges more.

## Edges & gotchas
One sentence can shift behavior dramatically at near-zero code cost — huge leverage, but also easy to break, so it needs regression tests.

deepSource.zh:
真实仓库的 system prompt 在 `src/prompt.ts`，通常上千行，按场景动态拼接。

| 维度 | 教学版 | 真实实现 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 形态 | 一句常量 | 多段按需拼接 |
| 工具说明 | 无 | 随启用工具注入 |
| 安全边界 | 无 | 显式权限/禁止项 |
| 环境信息 | 无 | 注入 cwd、时间、平台等 |

教学版只留一句，够说明"它如何在第一轮前设定行为"；生产里的拼接逻辑是工程细节，不影响理解这个机制。
deepSource.en:
A real repo's system prompt lives in `src/prompt.ts` — often thousands of lines, assembled dynamically per scenario.

| Aspect | Teaching | Real |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Form | one constant | many composed sections |
| Tool docs | none | injected per enabled tool |
| Safety | none | explicit permissions / denials |
| Environment | none | cwd, time, platform, … |

The teaching version keeps one line — enough to show "how it sets behavior before turn one"; the composition logic is engineering detail that doesn't change the mechanism.

real.zh: 按工具、权限、环境动态拼接
real.en: dynamically composed by tools, permissions, and environment

whySimplified.zh: 先聚焦 system 字段本身
whySimplified.en: focus on the system field itself first

real.zh: 明确禁止项与权限边界

whySimplified.zh: 先讲行为入口，再讲治理
whySimplified.en: teach the behavior entry point before governance

real.zh: 注入 cwd、平台、时间等上下文
real.en: inject cwd, platform, time, and other context

whySimplified.en: lower the cognitive load of the first lesson

commands.zh: 把关键规则同时放在开头和结尾，对比效果
commands.en: Put a key rule at both the start and end, then compare

observe.zh: 首尾强调是否提高规则遵守度

whatsNext.zh: 当你知道规则写在 system prompt 里，下一步自然会追问：这些规则如何按工具、权限和场景被拼装出来。
whatsNext.en: Once you know the rules live in the system prompt, the next natural question is how those rules are composed by toolset, permissions, and scenario.
